scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipsp <sips:sipsp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE [routes] Contact: sips:sipsp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 5000 RTP/AVP 9 0 18 120 a=rtcp-mux a=avaya-media-connectivity-check-supported a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000/1 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000/1 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000/1 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 m=video 5030 RTP/AVP 98 b=TIAS:512000 a=sendrecv a=rtcp-mux a=avaya-media-connectivity-check-supported a=rtpmap:98 H264/90000 a=fmtp:98 profile-level-id=42401f;packetization-mode=0 a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli

ACK sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipsp <sips:sipsp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] [routes] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sips:sipsp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

INVITE sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipsp <sips:sipsp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] [routes] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: sips:sipsp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 9 TLS/RTP/AVP 9 0 18 120 a=setup:active a=connection:new a=fingerprint:SHA-1 4A:AD:B9:B1:3F:82:18:3B:54:02:12:DF:3E:5D:49:6B:19:E5:7C:AB a=rtcp-mux a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000/1 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000/1 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000/1 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 m=video 9 TLS/RTP/AVP 98 a=setup:active a=connection:new a=fingerprint:SHA-1 3C:AD:B9:B1:3F:82:18:3B:54:02:12:DF:3E:5D:49:6B:19:E5:7C:XB b=TIAS:512000 a=rtcp-mux a=rtpmap:98 H264/90000 a=fmtp:98 profile-level-id=42401f;packetization-mode=0 a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli

ACK sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipsp <sips:sipsp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] [routes] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 ACK Contact: sips:sipsp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

BYE sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipsp <sips:sipsp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 BYE [routes] Contact: sips:sipsp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
